name: Banana Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Miracle Whip OR Miracle Whip Light Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dressing and sugar. Add bananas, combine flour and baking soda, and chips; mix until just moistened.
3. Spoon batter into greased or paper-lined muffin pan, filling each cup 2/3 full.
4. Bake for 15 minutes. Makes 12.
